validation_queries.name: Check for NULL customer IDs
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE customer_id IS NULL
validation_queries.description: Customer ID is a required field

validation_queries.name: Check for invalid email formats
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE email NOT RLIKE '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$'
validation_queries.description: Email must be in valid format

validation_queries.name: Check for duplicate customer IDs
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM staging_temp GROUP BY customer_id HAVING cnt > 1)

validation_queries.name: Check for negative amounts
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE amount < 0

validation_queries.name: Check for future dates
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE transaction_date > CURRENT_DATE()
validation_queries.description: Transaction date cannot be in the future

validation_queries.name: Check for NULL transaction IDs
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE transaction_id IS NULL

validation_queries.name: Check for NULL customer IDs
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE customer_id IS NULL

validation_queries.name: Check for NULL product IDs
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE product_id IS NULL

validation_queries.name: Check for invalid amounts
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE amount <= 0 OR amount > 1000000

validation_queries.name: Check for quantity issues
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE quantity <= 0 OR quantity > 100

validation_queries.name: Check for amount/price consistency
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE ABS(amount - (quantity * unit_price)) > 0.01

validation_queries.name: Check for orphan customers
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp st LEFT JOIN glue_catalog.{database}.dim_customers c ON st.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.customer_id IS NULL
validation_queries.description: All customer IDs must exist in dim_customers

validation_queries.name: Check for NULL product IDs
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE product_id IS NULL

validation_queries.name: Check for NULL product names
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE product_name IS NULL OR TRIM(product_name) = ''

validation_queries.name: Check for invalid prices
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE price <= 0

validation_queries.name: Check for negative stock
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM staging_temp WHERE stock < 0
